items.title: Bitcoin faces critical test as bulls aim to hold $60K: Did BTC bottom?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s loose hold on $60,000 and soft futures markets raise questions about whether BTC has bottomed.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Donald Trump has 10 days to decide on housing bill with CBDC ban
items.summary: House Speaker Mike Johnson transmitted a housing bill with a provision barring the US Federal Reserve issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030 to Donald Trump on Monday.

items.title: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
items.summary: A new model built by DeepReinforce is meant for developers who want AI that finishes the job, not just autocompletes the next line.

items.title: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
items.summary: Strategy's shares remained 42% down from its market-rattling Bitcoin sale nearly a month ago.

items.title: China Has Its Own Mythos Now, Says Qihoo 360 Founder. And One Version Is Free
items.summary: Qihoo 360 unveiled a homegrown vulnerability-hunting AI this week—and Z.ai went further, releasing comparable capabilities as open-weight code anyone can download.

items.title: Senate leaders push for July passage of CLARITY Act
items.summary: Lawmakers in the US Senate are on state work periods until July 13, giving them only four weeks to address a cryptocurrency market structure bill before another break and possible delays due to campaigning for elections.

items.title: Bitcoin put-call ratio hits 1-year high: Are bears preparing for drop to $55K?
items.summary: Rising demand for put options and persistent ETF outflows highlight Bitcoin's weakness despite lower oil prices.

items.title: Supreme Court Says Trump Can Fire SEC, CFTC Commissioners at Will—At a Crucial Moment for Crypto
items.summary: The court overturned a 91-year precedent, allowing President Trump to fire key federal regulators whenever he wishes for almost any reason.

items.title: Meta Unveils New Tech That Uses AI to Translate Brain Activity Into Text—Without Surgery
items.summary: Meta says its latest Brain2Qwerty system translates brain activity into sentences using non-invasive brain recordings, improving the accuracy of AI-powered neural decoding.

items.title: Bitcoin Is in a Fight at $60K—Here's What the Charts Say
